name: mc-test server agent (Fabric)
description: Thin Fabric dedicated-server shim for the mc-test server-truth driver: hosts an MCTP WebSocket server and answers the world-truth / fixtures / fake-player / plugin-state half of the protocol as MCTP primitives. agent.kind=serverMod. All wire logic lives in io.mctest:mc-test-agent-core; this mod only supplies the entrypoint and the Yarn-mapped server facade (mappings/Names.java).
